stories.title: Use built-in rapid profile for side project
stories.story: As a developer working on a side project, I want to select a rapid profile so that I can skip heavy gates and iterate quickly.

stories.title: Create custom spike profile
stories.story: As a developer who frequently prototypes, I want to create a custom spike profile with minimal gates so that I can use it across my projects.

stories.title: Select profile via natural language
stories.story: As a developer, I want to say 'quick build' and have the framework automatically select the rapid profile so that I don't need to remember command flags.

stories.title: Framework asks when profile is ambiguous
stories.story: As a developer, I want the framework to ask me which profile I meant when my input doesn't clearly match one so that I'm never silently given the wrong profile.

stories.title: See which profile is active before workflow starts
stories.story: As a developer, I want to see which profile was selected and have the chance to override it so that I'm always in control of gate strictness.

stories.title: Framework fixes my broken profile file
stories.story: As a developer who made a typo in my profile JSON, I want the framework to detect the error and offer to fix it so that I'm not blocked by a config mistake.

stories.title: Get warned when profile drops below recommended thresholds
stories.story: As a developer, I want to be warned when my custom profile sets thresholds below recommended levels so that I make an informed choice.

stories.title: Enforce minimum thresholds for team project
stories.story: As a team lead, I want to opt into enforcing minimum gate thresholds so that no developer can accidentally ship with gates disabled on our critical project.

stories.title: List all available profiles
stories.story: As a developer, I want to see all available profiles with their source and description so that I know what options I have.

stories.title: Set project default profile
stories.story: As a developer, I want to set a default profile for my project so that every workflow uses it without me specifying each time.

stories.title: Personal profile overrides project default
stories.story: As a developer who prefers different strictness than my project's default, I want my personal profile to take precedence so that I maintain autonomy.

stories.title: Per-project profiles in monorepo
stories.story: As a developer in a monorepo, I want each project to have its own profiles so that my API service can use strict while my internal tool uses rapid.
